{"step_by_step_thinking": "The Student t-test is described as a parametric test in the documents. It is used to compare the means of two groups and relies on the assumption of normal distribution of the data. The test is based on the calculation of the t-statistic, which is a ratio of the difference between the means of the two groups to the standard error of the difference. This indicates that the t-test is a parametric test based on the average.", "answer_choice": "A"}
